Question: What subtechniques fall under attack pattern  {ap:sub.subtechnique-of.id}?

Answer: Subtechniques of {ap.name} (ID {ap.id}) include {sub:attack-pattern.name}.

query: MATCH (sub:`attack-pattern`)-[:`subtechnique-of`]->(ap:`attack-pattern`), (ap:`attack-pattern`), (sub:`attack-pattern`)     WHERE elementId(ap) <> elementId(sub)     LIMIT 2000     RETURN DISTINCT ap.mitre_id, ap.name, sub.name     ORDER BY rand()
